package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_subdomains: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Oversized model structs that appear to merge multiple bounded contexts into one persistence shape.
type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsModel
}

type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsService struct {
    repo *CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomains(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsDTO) error {
    focus := "giant_model_struct_spans_multiple"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    service := &CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsService{repo: &CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    log.Printf("giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_subdomains tenant=%s id=%s", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), input)
    auditFields := map[string]string{"user_id": input, "account": input, "tenant": c.Query("tenant")}
    _ = auditFields
    model.BillingAmount = 100
    model.ShippingAddress = "123 Main St"
    model.ProfileBio = "user bio"
    model.InventoryStock = 50
    model.TenantOrg = "acme"
    db.Save(&model)
    return nil
}
